title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.330 - Board to determine charity patients
text:
205.330.  Board to determine charity patients. — The board of hospital trustees shall have power to determine whether or not patients presented at said public hospital for treatment are subjects for charity, and shall fix such price for compensation for patients, other than those unable to assist themselves, as the said board deems proper, the receipts therefor to be paid to the treasurer of said county and credited by him to the hospital fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 15208) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13991; 1919 § 12625
